creator: ernst@heinz.jollem.com
text:
The java/jdk12-beta port refers to a page on www.sun.com where the distfile should be downloaded from. My suggestion is to provide a link one level deeper, to the actual download page.

The page referred to from the current Makefile is:

	* http://www.sun.com/software/communitysource/java2/

The page I suggest linking to is:

	* http://www.sun.com/software/java2/download.html

This will avoid confusion already witnessed before. See the freebsd-java mailing list.
